final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing poster for cross-border e-commerce promotion.

Style/medium: bold typographic poster design, layered artistic typography with depth and hierarchy, editorial poster aesthetic
Composition: 16:9 landscape format, dynamic text layering with overlapping font styles at different scales, central product or subject partially obscuring text elements
Subject: cross-border e-commerce promotional theme with layered artistic lettering, main product or focal element positioned to overlap and partially cover typography
Scene/backdrop: structured but visually rich environment with organized complexity, geometric or abstract background elements supporting the text layers
Lighting/mood: balanced studio lighting with subtle dimensional shadows on layered text, energetic and commercial mood
Color palette: vibrant but controlled palette with high contrast between text layers, cohesive brand colors with strategic accent highlights
Materials/textures: clean vector typography with subtle dimensional effects, smooth product surfaces contrasting with textured text treatments
Constraints: text must remain legible despite layering; overlapping elements must create intentional visual rhythm not chaos; 16:9 aspect ratio mandatory
Avoid: cluttered disorganized layout, illegible text, generic stock photo aesthetic, flat single-layer typography, watermark, 8K stuffer language
